steps.observed: Approvals page rendered with header, refresh button, grouped sections

steps.expected: Pending approval items or proper empty state
steps.observed: API call GET /api/v1/admin/approvals returned all empty arrays (creditRequests:[], payrollRuns:[], periodCloseRequests:[], exportRequests:[]). Page correctly shows 'No pending approvals — All items have been reviewed. Check back later.' empty state

assertions.title: Approve Action Processes Approval

steps.expected: At least one pending item to approve
steps.observed: API GET /api/v1/admin/approvals returns all empty arrays — no pending items exist in the backend to test with

assertions.issues: No pending approval items exist in the backend test data. Cannot test approve action.

assertions.title: Reject Action with Reason

steps.expected: At least one pending item to reject
steps.observed: API GET /api/v1/admin/approvals returns all empty arrays — no pending items exist in the backend to test with

assertions.issues: No pending approval items exist in the backend test data. Cannot test reject action. Note: the frontend code for ApprovalsPage.tsx uses a ConfirmDialog for reject but does NOT include a reason input field — the reject handler passes { reason: '' }. This may be a UI gap per the validation contract which requires 'reason input required'.

assertions.title: Export Approvals Tab Shows Export Requests

steps.observed: Export Approvals page rendered with header, DataTable, search, refresh button

steps.expected: Columns: Requester, Export Type, Requested, Status with approve/reject actions
steps.observed: DataTable has columns: Requester, Export Type, Requested, Status. Row actions include Approve and Reject buttons. Search input 'Search by requester or type…' present

steps.expected: Proper empty state when no exports
steps.observed: Shows 'No pending export requests' empty message in DataTable

assertions.title: Audit Trail Lists Business Events

steps.expected: Audit trail page renders with business events
steps.observed: Audit trail page renders with tabs (Business Events, ML Events), actor filter input, refresh button

steps.expected: Business events listed with timestamp, actor, action, resource
steps.observed: Backend returns HTTP 500 for GET /api/v1/audit/business-events?page=0&size=20 — 'Internal Server Error: Failed to write request'. Frontend gracefully shows 'Audit Service Unavailable' with Try Again button
Filter input accepts text but cannot verify filtering due to backend 500 error

evidence.network: GET /api/v1/audit/business-events?page=0&size=20 -> 500 { status:500, detail:'Failed to write request' }

assertions.issues: Backend audit service returns HTTP 500 for business events endpoint. Frontend handles the error gracefully with proper error UI. The page structure, tabs, filters, and error handling all work correctly.

assertions.title: Audit Trail ML Events Tab

steps.action: Click 'ML Events' tab on audit trail page
steps.observed: Tab switched successfully to ML Events

steps.expected: ML events listed with model, action, confidence, timestamp
steps.observed: API GET /api/v1/audit/ml-events?page=0&size=20 returns 200 with empty data (content:[], totalElements:0). Page shows 'No ML events recorded yet.' empty state

steps.expected: ML Events tab with proper columns
steps.observed: Tab renders with Refresh button. Columns defined in code: Timestamp, Actor, Action, Type, Module, Status

assertions.issues: Note: The ML events columns include Action, Type (interactionType), Module, and Status, but do NOT include a 'confidence' column as mentioned in the validation contract. The backend MlInteractionEventResponse may not have a confidence field. This is a minor discrepancy between the contract and actual implementation.

frictions.description: Approvals page rejection flow does NOT include a reason input field — the ConfirmDialog only shows confirm/cancel buttons with a message. The code passes { reason: '' } to reject APIs. This is a gap vs the validation contract which specifies 'reason input required'.
frictions.resolution: Not resolved — code change needed to add reason input to rejection dialog

frictions.description: ML Events tab does not show 'confidence' field — backend MlInteractionEventResponse does not appear to have a confidence field, so the column is absent from the DataTable
frictions.resolution: Minor discrepancy — validation contract mentions confidence but backend may not support it

blockers.description: No pending approval items exist in backend test data — all four approval categories (creditRequests, payrollRuns, periodCloseRequests, exportRequests) return empty arrays from GET /api/v1/admin/approvals
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified API response directly via curl — confirmed all arrays empty

blockers.description: Backend audit business events endpoint returns HTTP 500 (Internal Server Error: 'Failed to write request') — cannot verify business events listing or filter functionality
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried request via browser Refresh button and curl — consistently returns 500

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 2 passed, 0 failed, 3 blocked, 0 skipped. VAL-ADMIN-014 (Approvals queue) passes — page renders correctly with proper empty state when no items exist. VAL-ADMIN-017 (Export Approvals) passes — page structure correct with DataTable, columns, and approve/reject actions. VAL-ADMIN-015 and VAL-ADMIN-016 blocked due to no pending approval data in backend. VAL-ADMIN-026 blocked due to backend audit service returning 500. VAL-ADMIN-027 (ML Events tab) passes — tab renders correctly with empty state, but lacks 'confidence' column per contract. Notable finding: reject flow in ApprovalsPage does not prompt for a reason, contradicting the contract requirement.
